creator: tijl@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 251221
patch3

I've made some changes to the patch.  Can you review them?

- Use IGNORE instead of BROKEN in fancy and gdata plugins because this is broken by design, nothing we can fix.
- Enable litehtml_viewer again.
- Clean up dependencies.
- Disable GDK deprecation warnings flooding the build log.
- Enable i18n of the plugins.
- Enable parallel build of plugins.
